strengths: ~20 years of consistent software delivery across diverse stacks (D, TS, Swift, PHP) shows genuine builder breadth
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates product ownership and initiative beyond pure IC execution
Recent Staff Engineer role at re:cinq with AI-agent infra exposure shows awareness of the AI shift and early positioning
concerns: Zero AI/ML depth: no listed frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, etc.), no ML products shipped, no research background — the role requires recognized AI expertise and a Master/PhD in AI is preferred
No cloud platform leadership: AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is infrastructure-as-code tooling, not the cloud architecture or AI platform strategy required to advise strategic customers at Director level

Title and scope mismatch: 'Senior Software Developer' and 'Staff Engineer (3 months)' career trajectory has no Director-level IC evidence, no strategic advisory engagements, no industry recognition in AI

key_factors.factor: No demonstrable AI expertise — no ML frameworks, no AI products shipped at scale, no research output or recognized thought leadership in AI
Cloud advisory experience absent — the role demands advising strategic customers on AI/cloud adoption; resume shows no customer-facing strategy or cloud architecture ownership
Recent AI exposure is shallow and brief — 3 months on AI-agent infra at a small startup does not constitute the depth needed for a Director-level AI strategy role

response.justification: Bogdan has a solid generalist engineering career but is fundamentally mismatched for a Director-level Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role: he has no AI/ML credentials, no cloud platform expertise beyond tooling, no track record of strategic advisory work, and only three months of tangential AI infrastructure exposure. The role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise, likely a graduate degree in AI, and the ability to inspire and advise at a strategic level — none of which the resume substantiates. Advancing this candidate would require ignoring nearly every primary qualification.
